summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PyrunAi website iteration 2 - major UI/UX enhancements. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). New features like rotating hero backgrounds, animated counters, calendar booking system, video modals, and dark hero sections are functional. One minor frontend issue with contact form status message display.

ui_bugs.issue: Status message after form submission not displaying to user
ui_bugs.details: Form submits successfully to backend API but success/error message doesn't appear to provide user feedback

passed_tests: Backend API health check (/api/) - 200 OK
Contact form submission (/api/contact) - 200 OK
Contact form with preferred_date/time fields - 200 OK
Get contact submissions (/api/contact/submissions) - 200 OK
Homepage rotating hero backgrounds (3 images with indicators)
Homepage animated stats counters (98%, 50+, 3x, 24/7)
Homepage services section with image cards and hover effects
Homepage Featured Work section with 3 project images
Homepage tech ticker scrolling with technology names
Services page dark hero background with tech image
Services page video play buttons for all 4 services (modals work)
Services page project galleries (3 projects per service with metrics)
Services page feature cards with hover effects (28 cards)
Contact page dark hero background
Contact page 2-step calendar booking system
Contact page calendar with current month, past days disabled, weekends disabled
Contact page date selection (22 available dates)
Contact page time slot selection (18 slots: 9:00-17:30, 30min intervals)
Contact page green confirmation bar with Continue button
Contact page Step 2 form with selected date/time display
Contact page all form fields functional
About page dark hero background
Case Studies page dark hero background
Navigation links between all pages
Mobile responsive design at 375px viewport
Mobile menu toggle visible
Mobile hero section with stacked CTA buttons
Mobile stats in 2-column layout
Mobile service cards stack vertically
Mobile testimonials as carousel (1 visible)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix contact form status message display - ensure success/error messages appear after form submission to provide proper user feedback
